main.name: Shrijith Vakula
main.description: My name is Shrijith Vakula. I am a student in Dublin High School majoring in Mechanical Engineering.
main.bio: I am 17 years old, and I am currently a senior at Dublin High School, Dublin CA. I am smart, resourceful, and a fast learner. I’m very good with computers. I’m very good at following instructions, and work in an efficient manner. I always love a challenge and I work very well independently, and as a team
main.contactmessage: I rarely answer my phone but I always check my email.

resume.skillmessage: My skills encompass a large part of the science and engineering side with a forte in Computer Science, Engineering, and Music Production. My creative talents include music production and origami.

education.description: High School was where I expanded my interest in the Engineering and Music field. I took Intro to Engineering Design, Principles of Engineering, and Digital Electronics, and AP Music Theory.

I took many courses in Las Positas that pertain to the field of Engineering and Computer Science like: Engineering Design Graphics, Intro to Engineering, Introduction to Python, Introduction to Java PRogramming, and Computer Information Systems.
